global.description: The ad features a vibrant layout promoting a weekend getaway with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Book hotels and flights easily for a weekend escape.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large, abstract shape in the center, possibly a blend of rounded and angular forms in a soft color.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A smaller, contrasting shape overlaying the background, adding depth and interest.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Escape this weekend' with a modern font, centrally positioned.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Hotels + flights in one tap

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: Prominent text at the top reading 'RouteBloom SALE' in a striking font, possibly with a bright accent color.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now' in a clear, inviting font, designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small, bold text displaying '$4.99' at the bottom, indicating the cost of the offer.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main offer text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
